name: simwarga
description: SimWarga - Sistem Informasi Manajemen Warga (SaaS Multi-Tenant)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BE,FE -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n BE,FE -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.setup: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
